ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is closed for PE services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
(RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity") && (ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - SCP Declined")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - Client Abandoned Proposal")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - No Change/Lost")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - No Change"))&&
(ISNULL(CloseDate)|| ISPICKVAL(Close_Reason__c, "")|| ISBLANK(Other_Detail__c) || ISNULL(Lost_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Lost Date, Close Date, Close Reason and Closed Stage Detail.
